title: malaxis massonii
intro: Malaxis massonii, also known as the Yellow Pogonia, is a species of orchid found in North America. It is an herb used in traditional medicine, particularly in Native American and folk healing practices, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Malaxis massonii include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Malaxis massonii can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and it is also used in poultices and salves to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
